observations.archetype_gloss: The protagonist struggling against internal and external obstacles toward a higher purpose
observations.summary: Dan faces temptation to abandon his arduous spiritual ascent, reflecting an internal struggle against surrendering to forgetfulness and comfort, which would halt his progress toward an undefined higher goal.

evidence.quote: She was offering him forgetfulness. Comfort. A way to stop the endless, exhausting climb toward something he couldn't even name. And for just a moment, he was tempted. Then he thought of his father, buried in his hoard, confusing accumulation for meaning.
